title: Sixth judicial district
doc_html:
§621.6.  Sixth judicial district

The sixth judicial district court shall have two judges.  

Acts 1956, Ex.Sess., No. 7, §1.  Amended by Acts 1974, No. 515, §1, emerg. eff. July 12, 1974.
doc_text:
§621.6.  Sixth judicial district
The sixth judicial district court shall have two judges.
Acts 1956, Ex.Sess., No. 7, §1.  Amended by Acts 1974, No. 515, §1, emerg. eff. July 12, 1974.
